fields.name: Enhanced
fields.description: The power's effect is noticeably stronger. Damage increases, durations extend, or effects become more pronounced.
fields.admin_notes: Achievable with moderate resonance stacking or aura alignment.

fields.name: Amplified
fields.description: Additional targets or area of effect. Single-target powers can affect small groups; area powers expand significantly.
fields.admin_notes: Requires good resonance alignment and likely emotional state boost.

fields.name: Overwhelming
fields.description: Mass targeting becomes possible. Effects that normally affect one or few can sweep across crowds or battlefields.
fields.admin_notes: Difficult to achieve without relationship invocation or perfect conditions.

fields.name: Scene-Defining
fields.description: The power becomes a pivotal moment in the scene. Effects are dramatic and memorable, potentially changing the course of events.
fields.admin_notes: Very rare. Usually requires multiple relationship invocations and dramatic stakes.

fields.name: Audere
fields.description: World-shaking power. Reality bends. This is the stuff of legends - effects that will be remembered for generations.
fields.admin_notes: Audere threshold. Should only occur in climactic moments with heavy relationship investment. Control failure at this tier can be catastrophic.
